mentions.note: Don't take selling personally; Cramer loves Apple and says own it, don't trade it. Selling driven by speculators liquidating to raise SpaceX IPO cash. Apple spending next to nothing on AI via Alphabet deal.
Selling is driven by speculators raising cash for SpaceX/Anthropic/OpenAI IPOs, not company fundamentals. Own it, don't trade it. Minimal AI spending due to Alphabet deal.
Selling is from speculators raising cash for SpaceX; don't take it personally. Cramer loves Apple, owns it. It's a donor to SpaceX cause, not a weak fundamental story. Own it, don't trade it.

Selling is forced liquidation to fund SpaceX IPO, not fundamental weakness. Cramer loves Apple; own it, don't trade it. Used as liquidity source by speculators. Long-term holder play; ignore day-to-day noise.
Heavy selling driven by portfolio liquidation for SpaceX allocations, not fundamentals. AI spending minimal due to Alphabet/Gemini deal. Own long-term, don't trade.
Fantastic balance sheet, robust buyback, beloved products; still has scarcity characteristics despite broader tech oversupply fears.

Clean story but WWDC announcement disappointed traders. Siri improvements and AI integration real, but Apple's leadership position matters too much to lose. Wanted it to open down and rally instead; traders are the losers, not Apple.
Avoids massive AI capex by piggybacking off Alphabet's spending; with 2.5B active devices, competitive chatbot makers need access to Apple's audience. WWDC Monday should reveal Siri improvements.

Best hardware; snared Gemini AI (logical extension of Google partnership, which pays Apple fortune for search placement); thought behind in AI but users not switching handsets; smart Siri getting smarter; near-perfect execution drives ever-higher stock price and acclaim.
2016 plunge to $23 offered major discount for best-in-class products and customer loyalty; skeptics proved wrong repeatedly; example of why patience with quality pays off.
Still matters due to iPhone and App Store (software), but era of software dominance that made Apple valuable is ending as hardware/AI chips now drive value.
Added to FANG as FAANGu; Magnificent Seven member; obvious consumer tech; $1,000 in 2013 would have grown to $17,994 by 2024.
One of two stocks earning 'own it, don't trade it' highest blessing; revolutionary company with outstanding management; still monitor thesis changes.
